messages.text: Ossuara unfurls a limb of packed fungus tipped in swallowed bone and rakes it through you, and the rot goes in with the wound. The blow {verb} you!
Ossuara sweeps a great bloom-crowned limb at you and you fling yourself flat as it passes overhead, shedding spore.
Ossuara folds every petal of itself around you and grinds, and for a moment you feel the garden begin to take you apart for planting! The blow {verb} you!
